meanings.definition: appear or become visible; make a showing
examples: She turned up at the funeral
I hope the list key is going to surface again

meanings.definition: bend or lay so that one part covers the other
discover the location of; determine the place of; find by searching or examining
examples: Can you locate your cousins in the Midwest?

meanings.definition: be shown or be found to be
examples: The medicine turned out to save her life

meanings.definition: find by digging in the ground
examples: I dug up an old box in the garden
